_comment: Personas drive permission trimming. A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR 'all'. associate_dean = full governance view incl accreditation-confidential threads + sensitivity-labelled self-study and personnel files; committee_member = committee signals + the self-study draft but NOT accreditation-confidential liaison threads or personnel files; adjunct = least privilege; provost = sees everything.

personas.label: Dr. Laura Simmons — Associate Dean, College of Business
personas.description: Full governance leadership view including accreditation-confidential liaison threads and sensitivity-labelled self-study and personnel documents.

personas.label: Dr. Ada Okonkwo — Assessment Coordinator (committee member)
personas.description: Sees committee meetings, action items, and the sensitivity-labelled self-study draft, but NOT accreditation-confidential liaison threads or personnel review files.

personas.label: Dr. Sam Reyes — Adjunct Faculty (least privilege)
personas.description: Least-privilege faculty. Sees only non-sensitive governance signals; cannot see accreditation-confidential threads, the self-study draft, or personnel files.

personas.label: Dr. Gloria Hahn — Provost (escalation)
personas.description: Institutional leadership view. Sees everything associate_dean sees.
